rulings.Case Title: SANDY MCINISH, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al VS. ASBESTOS COMPANIES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 24, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Gould Pumps, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, alternatively, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)

On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 24, 2015 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Union Pacific Railroad Company's demurrer to first amended complaint is continued on the court's own motion to September 30, 2015. = (503/TLJ)
